title: Maximize your staking
introduction: You have {{available}} ICP available that isn't earning rewards. Staking 100% of your ICP maximizes your governance rewards.

whyStake.title: Why stake everything?
whyStake.rewards: Unstaked ICP earns 0%, while staked ICP earns up to {{maxApy}}% APY.
whyStake.votingPower: More stake equals more influence in governance decisions.
whyStake.flexibility: You can dissolve neurons anytime (withdrawable after the locking period).

recommendation: Stake your available {{available}} ICP with an 8-year delay to maximize your rewards.
